allow: Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install pillow pillow-heif tkinterdnd2 pyinstaller)

Bash(./venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import PIL, pillow_heif, tkinterdnd2; print\('PIL', PIL.__version__\); print\('pillow_heif', pillow_heif.__version__\); print\('tkinterdnd2', tkinterdnd2.__version__\)")

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\Mauricio\\Documents\\ProyectosClaude\\ConvesorIphonePng\\dist\\ConversorFotos.exe" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK: proceso vivo PID $\($p.Id\) tras 6s \(la ventana abrio sin crashear\)"; $p.Kill\(\) } else { Write-Output "FALLO: el exe salio con codigo $\($p.ExitCode\)" })
